headline: India Defence Budget FY26 increased 13% to Rs 7.5 lakh crore
ai_summary: Defence budget crosses Rs 7.5 lakh crore — highest ever. 25% earmarked for domestic procurement under Make in India. Positive for all domestic defence manufacturers.

headline: L&T wins mega airport infrastructure order in Saudi Arabia
ai_summary: L&T secures a large international airport EPC order in Saudi Arabia worth approximately Rs 8000 crore. Positive for international revenue mix.

headline: HAL Tejas Mk-1A production begins at Nashik facility
ai_summary: HAL begins series production of Tejas Mk-1A at Nashik. First delivery to IAF expected in Q2FY26. Positive for revenue ramp-up from Rs 48000 crore Tejas contract.

headline: India Railway Budget FY26 — Rs 2.65 lakh crore capex
ai_summary: Indian Railways gets its highest ever allocation at Rs 2.65 lakh crore. Electrification, new lines and station redevelopment drive orders for railway EPC companies.

headline: Adani Green commissions 1 GW solar plant in Rajasthan
ai_summary: Adani Green commissions 1 GW hybrid renewable plant. Adds to its growing installed capacity. Green energy sector continues strong momentum.

headline: FMCG companies see rural volume recovery in Q4FY25
ai_summary: FMCG rural volumes growing 6-8% in Q4FY25 aided by better monsoon and declining food inflation. Positive for volume-led growth in FY26.

headline: RBI keeps repo rate unchanged at 6.25%; accommodative stance
ai_summary: RBI MPC keeps rates unchanged. Neutral for banks near-term. Accommodation stance positive for credit growth continuation.

headline: Dixon Technologies wins Rs 8,000 crore Apple iPhone component order
ai_summary: Dixon Technologies secures iPhone supply chain component order from Apple. Rs 8000 crore order over 2 years. Significant for EMS sector validation.

headline: Mazagon Dock gets Rs 35,000 crore submarine contract under P75I
ai_summary: Government approves P75I submarine programme. MDL shortlisted as prime contractor. Total programme value Rs 40000-50000 crore over 15 years.

headline: Solar panel prices fall 40% — margins squeeze for Indian EPC firms
ai_summary: Steep fall in global solar panel prices positive for demand but squeezes margins for EPC contractors bidding at new rates.
